description: Agent-native XRPL settlement intelligence derived from live validated ledger telemetry.

signals.agent_action_hint: use XRPL for settlement when ledger progression is fresh and stable
signals.value_reason: Validated ledger progression indicates settlement continuity and network liveness.

signals.agent_action_hint: prefer XRPL settlement while validated ledger age remains fresh
signals.value_reason: Ledger age and RPC latency provide direct settlement freshness context for autonomous payment flows.

signals.agent_action_hint: confirm rail health before routing high-value autonomous settlement operations
signals.value_reason: Network health determines whether XRPL is suitable as a real-time machine payment rail.

signals.agent_action_hint: delay non-urgent settlement when congestion_state is elevated
signals.value_reason: Congestion state helps agents avoid degraded execution windows.
